field.label: Log Level
field.help: Choose the level of detail the LCDproc daemon will write to the system log.

field.label: COM port
field.help: Set the com port LCDproc should use.

field.label: Display Size
field.help: Set the display size LCDproc should use.

field.label: Driver
field.help: Select the LCD driver LCDproc should use. Some drivers will show additional settings.

field.label: Display Type
field.help: Select the Matrix Orbital display type.

field.label: Has adjustable backlight
field.help: Some firmware versions of Matrix Orbital and compatible modules do not support an adjustable backlight and only can switch the backlight on/off. If the LCD experiences randomly appearing block characters and the backlight cannot be switched on or off, uncheck the adjustable backlight option.

field.label: Background Color
field.help: LCD Background Color. Some Matrix Orbital compatible Adafruit controller boards have extended commands to set the background color. This works independently of the adjustable backlight checkbox. Leave at default if this feature is not supported.

field.label: Port Speed
field.help: Set the port speed. Caution: not all the driver or panels support all the speeds, leave "default" if unsure.

field.label: Refresh Frequency
field.help: Set the duration for which each info screen will be displayed.

field.label: Enable Output LEDs
field.help: Enable the output LEDs present on some LCD panels. This feature is currently supported by the CFontzPacket driver only.

field.label: OPNsense control menu
field.help: Enable the OPNsense control menu next to LCDproc's Options menu. Requires a display with buttons (e.g. CrystalFontz 635/735/835). Currently supports several basic functions including reboot and halt.

field.label: Brightness
field.help: Set the brightness of the LCD panel. This option is not supported by all the LCD panels, leave "default" if unsure.

field.label: Contrast
field.help: Set the contrast of the LCD panel. This option is not supported by all the LCD panels, leave "default" if unsure.

field.label: Backlight
field.help: Set the backlight setting. If set to the default value, then the backlight setting of the display can be influenced by the clients. This option is not supported by all the LCD panels, leave "default" if unsure.

field.label: Off Brightness
field.help: Set the off-brightness of the LCD panel. This value is used when the display is normally switched off in case LCDd is inactive. This option is not supported by all the LCD panels, leave "default" if unsure.
